column1: # phase-67: sort the loose files under src/fs/ and src/tpc/ into concept sub-folders.
# fs: the loose vfs_* facade layer (ops + backend registry + the reserved
#     fd_cache slot) moves under src/fs/vfs/; backend/ stays the raw driver
#     plane below the seam, core/ stays the ngx-free kernel.
# tpc: gsi/ = outbound GSI handshake kernel; outbound/ = the source-session
#      client pipeline run on the thread pool; engine/ = event-loop
#      orchestration (opaque parse, open-path launch, completion handoff,
#      SHM key registry, disabled-build stubs, module-internal header).
